title: Terrestria Reforged
body:
This version of Terrestria is an unofficial port for the Forge mod loader. You can find the Fabric version at Terrestria. 

Terrestria.

This is in no way related to the Terraformers team or any of their memebers, they are listed as former authors only to pay proper credits to them for the code I did not write myself and other assets. Please bring any issues that you encounter with this to MY github, NOT THEIRS.

Terrestria Reforged is a detailed and vibrant biomes mod for Minecraft running on the Forge mod loader. Terrestria enhances gameplay through the addition of 17 major biomes supported by 24 component biomes, 9 new wood types, as well as a healthy selection of foliage - providing a refreshing new selection of terrain.

 

Terrestria Reforged requires Terraformed Api Reforged and Fabric's Biome API Reforged 

Check out my Discord Server to chat about Terrestria and other Reforged mods!

Visit the Terrestria Wiki to learn more about each biome

The goal of Terrestria is to be the most polished and visually appealing biomes mod available for Minecraft, and to this end there has been intense focus on selecting, detailing, and refining the biomes until they look absolutely amazing. Rather than add tons of different biomes, focus has been put into adding a rather small amount of biomes and then populating them with large amounts of detail and component biomes. This overall results in a more cohesive experience compared to existing biome mods.

Biomes:

v1.0.0 - Initial Release
  • Caldera
  • Cypress Forest
  • Cypress Swamp
  • Dense Woodlands
  • Hemlock Rainforest
  • Japanese Maple Forest
  • Lush Redwood Forest
  • Rainbow Rainforest
  • Redwood Forest
  • Sakura Forest
  • Snowy Hemlock Forest
  • Volcanic Island
v2.0.0 - The Dry Update
  • Canyon
  • Dunes
  • Lush Desert
  • Oasis
  • Outback

Some biomes contain variants to increase variety

Images of the biomes can be found on the Images page.

 

Other Mods by Terraformers:

Check out Terrestria's sister mod, Traverse Reforged:

Traverse works well alongside Terrestria if you are looking for a set of biomes that are closer to the Vanilla+ ideal. Traverse has a lot of unique, colorful biomes that embrace the simple vanilla aesthetic instead of trying to overshadow it.(TBD: traverse reforged currently does not work my my biome api mod, it's not my mod so it doesn't yet use my api. I hope to get them to use it though, otherwise support will be a pain.)

Check out my port of the Terraformers Nether biome expansion, Cinderscapes Reforged:

Cinderscapes complements Terrestria by providing an expansion to the nether, much like Terrestria does to the overworld. Cinderscapes brings more life and beauty to the nether, while also keeping it frightening.
